metadata.description: HTML Explainer — a Claude Code skill for generating polished, interactive single-page HTML explainers of technical systems, frameworks, plans, and designs: a fixed v4-quality design system, sticky scroll-spy TOC, 18 section patterns, 6 SVG diagram recipes, and a Playwright screenshot verification loop.

plugins.name: html-explainer
plugins.description: Generate polished single-page HTML explainers with a fixed design system, 18 section patterns, 6 SVG diagram recipes, and Playwright screenshot verification.
